description: VietGlobal is a reliable exporter, offering a wide variety of quality products at the best prices, fast delivery and excellent customer service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.address: 21/86 To Vinh Dien Street, Thanh Xuan District, Hanoi, Vietnam

seaFreight.title: SEA FREIGHT
seaFreight.desc: Our sea freight services are regularly audited and analyzed to ensure they meet modern business requirements. Continuous improvements are made to ensure our services always exceed customer expectations.

truckingDelivery.title: TRUCKING DELIVERY
truckingDelivery.desc: Contact us for shipping manuals and handling tariffs for the services you require. With our own operation team, trucks and forklifts, we operate around the clock to ensure cargo is delivered on time.

airFreight.title: AIR FREIGHT SERVICE
airFreight.desc: Contact us today for cargo survey, cost estimation and packing solutions for your next shipment. We provide custom wooden cases, crates, pallets and vacuum packing to meet industrial packaging requirements.

customsClearance.title: CUSTOMS CLEARANCE SERVICE
customsClearance.desc: We ensure our fleet is well maintained and equipped with modern vehicles to meet all transportation requirements efficiently and safely.

allServices.title: All Services
allServices.desc: We provide comprehensive logistics services to meet your business needs including sea freight, air freight, trucking delivery and customs clearance.

trucking.title: Trucking Delivery
trucking.desc: Contact us for shipping instructions and handling tariffs for the services you require. Our team ensures your cargo is prepared and transported according to necessary standards.

customs.title: Customs Clearance
customs.desc: We ensure our fleet is well maintained and equipped with modern technology to transport high-value and oversized cargo efficiently and safely.

air.title: Air Freight
air.desc: Contact us today for cargo inspection, cost estimation and the best air freight solutions for your next shipment.

sea.title: Sea Freight
sea.desc: Our sea freight services are regularly reviewed and optimized to meet modern logistics and supply chain demands.
